name: Label
summary: This is an interface to a label entity. A Label consists of a FormattedText and the label leader Path. A Label may be connected to another Entity via a ConnectionPoint.

constructors.name: initialize
constructors.summary: The #initialize method creates a new disconnected Layout::Label.
constructors.remarks: The #initialize method creates a new disconnected Layout::Label.

params.name: target_point
params.doc: Where the label leader should point to

throws.when: if anchor_type is not a valid anchor type
if leader_type is not a valid leader line type
if plain_text is an empty string

methods.name: connect
methods.summary: The #connect method connects the Layout::Label to the given ConnectionPoint.
methods.remarks: The #connect method connects the Layout::Label to the given ConnectionPoint. The leader line will be adjusted to point at the ConnectionPoint. The Layout::Label must be in the same Document as the ConnectionPoint. If both the Layout::Label and the ConnectionPoint's Entity are on non-shared Layout::Layers, they must be on the same Page.

throws.when: if the Layout::Label is on a locked Layout::Layer
if the Layout::Label is not in the same Document as the ConnectionPoint
if both the Layout::Label and the ConnectionPoint are on non-shared Layout::Layers, but are not on the same Page.

methods.name: disconnect
methods.summary: The #disconnect method disconnects the Layout::Label from its ConnectionPoint.
methods.remarks: The #disconnect method disconnects the Layout::Label from its ConnectionPoint. The leader line will not be adjusted by disconnecting from a ConnectionPoint.

throws.when: if the Layout::Label is on a locked Layout::Layer

methods.name: entities
methods.summary: The #entities method returns the Entities that represent the Layout::Label in its exploded form.
methods.remarks: The #entities method returns the Entities that represent the Layout::Label in its exploded form.

params.name: page
params.doc: The Page to use to convert an auto-text tag to display text

throws.when: if page does not belong to the same document as the Layout::Label

properties.name: connection_type
properties.summary: The #connection_type method returns the type of the text connection for the Layout::Label.
properties.remarks: The #connection_type method returns the type of the text connection for the Layout::Label. The leader line type can be one of the following values: Layout::Label::CONNECTION_TYPE_NONE Layout::Label::CONNECTION_TYPE_AUTO Layout::Label::CONNECTION_TYPE_REVERSE_AUTO Layout::Label::CONNECTION_TYPE_TOP_LEFT Layout::Label::CONNECTION_TYPE_CENTER_LEFT Layout::Label::CONNECTION_TYPE_BOTTOM_LEFT Layout::Label::CONNECTION_TYPE_TOP_RIGHT Layout::Label::CONNECTION_TYPE_CENTER_RIGHT Layout::Label::CONNECTION_TYPE_BOTTOM_RIGHT

properties.name: leader_line
properties.summary: The #leader_line method returns a copy of the leader line.
properties.remarks: The #leader_line method returns a copy of the leader line.

properties.name: leader_line_type
properties.summary: The #leader_line_type method returns the type of the leader line for the Layout::Label.
properties.remarks: The #leader_line_type method returns the type of the leader line for the Layout::Label. The leader line type can be one of the following values: Layout::Label::LEADER_LINE_TYPE_SINGLE_SEGMENT Layout::Label::LEADER_LINE_TYPE_TWO_SEGMENT Layout::Label::LEADER_LINE_TYPE_BEZIER Layout::Label::LEADER_LINE_TYPE_UNKNOWN

properties.name: text
properties.summary: The #text method returns a copy of the FormattedText of the Layout::Label.
properties.remarks: The #text method returns a copy of the FormattedText of the Layout::Label.
